title: Merchandise Displayers and Window Trimmers
description: Plan and erect commercial displays, such as those in windows and interiors of retail stores and at trade exhibitions.

tasks.text: Plan commercial displays to entice and appeal to customers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange properties, furniture, merchandise, backdrops, or other accessories, as shown in prepared sketches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change or rotate window displays, interior display areas, or signage to reflect changes in inventory or promotion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place prices or descriptive signs on backdrops, fixtures, merchandise, or floor.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with store managers, buyers, sales associates, housekeeping staff, or engineering staff to determine appropriate placement of displays or products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain props, products, or mannequins, inspecting them for imperfections, doing touch-ups, cleaning up after customers, or applying preservative coatings as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop ideas or plans for merchandise displays or window decorations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble or set up displays, furniture, or products in store space, using colors, lights, pictures, or other accessories to display the product.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install booths, exhibits, displays, carpets, or drapes, as guided by floor plan of building or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select themes, lighting, colors, or props to be used.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with advertising or sales staff to determine type of merchandise to be featured and time and place for each display.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend training sessions or corporate planning meetings to obtain new ideas for product launches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with others to obtain products or other display items.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Construct or assemble displays or display components from fabric, glass, paper, or plastic, using hand tools or woodworking power tools, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain plans from display designers or display managers and discuss their implementation with clients or supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take photographs of displays or signage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dress mannequins for displays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise or train staff members on daily tasks, such as visual merchandising.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Store, pack, and maintain inventory records of props, products, or display items.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Use computers to produce signage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare sketches, floor plans, or models of proposed displays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct sales staff in color coordination of clothing racks or counter displays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install decorations, such as flags, banners, festive lights, or bunting on or in building, street, exhibit hall, or booth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut out designs on cardboard, hardboard, or plywood, according to motif of event.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
